name: Pear Harlequin
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe, stem, peel and core the pears.
2. Cut the pears into small pieces.
3. Mix the pear pieces with crushed pineapple and juice and grated rind of the orange.
4. Measure: For each 4 cups of fruit mixture, add 3 cups sugar.
5. Cover and let stand overnight.
6. Simmer until thick (about 2 hours).
7. Add halved cherries and stir well.
8. Process in boiling water bath for 10 minutes.
9. Makes eight 6 oz jars.
NOTE: This is good used as a topping on pound cake.
